metadata.name: Conduct a Project Lessons Learned Meeting

description: After a project is complete, the PM holds a 'lessons learned' meeting with the team to identify successes and failures to improve future projects.

nodes.task_description: Schedule a lessons learned meeting with the key project team members.
During the meeting, document what went well and what could be improved.

expected_outcome.value: A list of successes and areas for improvement is documented.

nodes.task_description: Archive the lessons learned document in the company's knowledge base for future reference.

expected_outcome.value: The document is successfully archived and tagged for future projects.
